mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.invoice_number AS invoiceNumber, i.invoice_note AS invoiceNote, i.customer_name AS customerName, i.customer_phone AS customerPhone, i.original_amount AS originalAmount, i.extra_fee AS extraFee, i.discount_amount AS discountAmount, i.discount_percentage AS discountPercentage, i.total_amount AS totalAmount, i.status_id AS statusId, CASE i.status_id WHEN 1 THEN 'WAITING' WHEN 2 THEN 'PAID' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELED' END AS statusName, i.created_at AS createdAt, i.updated_at AS updatedAt, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total FROM invoices i WHERE 1 = 1
AND i.invoice_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{f.invoiceNumber}, '%')
AND DATE(i.created_at) = DATE(#{f.createdAt})
AND i.status_id IN
#{s.id}
ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{size}

SELECT ii.invoice_id AS invoiceId, ii.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, ii.quantity, ii.price, (ii.price * ii.quantity) AS subTotal FROM invoice_items ii LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = ii.product_id WHERE ii.invoice_id IN
#{id}::uuid
